description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, set on a rectangular green plot. The main building features large glass doors and windows on the front facade, with a striped black-and-white exterior. Adjacent to the house is a detached garage with a driveway, and a red car is parked outside. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and a small patio area with lounge chairs. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, living, and bathroom spaces, and the property is surrounded by a mix of paved and grassy surfaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a detached garage, a swimming pool, and a minimalist black-and-white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, striped facade, driveway, garage, and pool area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, patio furniture, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Back side view displaying the solid rear wall, pool, and the garage positioned to the right.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the garage, driveway, and the side entrance to the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass doors and windows
